svg.title: IoTextra Octal overview
svg.desc: IoTextra Octal — 4+2+2 mixed I/O module overview with key specs
svg.text: 4+2+2 mixed I/O module · 4 digital inputs · 2 NPN outputs · 2 SPST relays · galvanic isolation · 3750 VRMS
Inputs up to 36 VDC · outputs up to 100 VDC / 8 A · relay 250 VAC / 5 A · HOST and Qwiic connectors
Part of the IoTextra series · compatible with IoTsmart and IoTbase · Open Hardware
